theme_and_archetype.archetype: High-End Education Startup (Editorial Scholastic + Swiss Modernity)
theme_and_archetype.description: A world-class, premium educational platform mimicking top ed-tech startups (Xylem, PW) but maintaining a unique premium identity. Trustworthy, academic, highly modern, using editorial serif headings and sleek sans-serif body text.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis Smooth Scrolling for premium momentum feel
motion_and_interactions.triggers: GSAP ScrollTrigger for stagger fade-ins on sections
motion_and_interactions.micro: Framer Motion for hover states, button presses, and text reveal animations
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom cursor (optional, subtle dot with trailing ring)
motion_and_interactions.loading: Premium academic text reveal loading screen
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with increased shadow; buttons scale up slightly and increase brightness.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism sticky header: `fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5`. Contains Logo, Links, and CTA button.
components.hero: Premium minimalist layout. Overline label, large Fraunces H1, Outfit description. Interactive 3D particle background (using tsparticles or Three.js) representing 'learning connections'. Primary gradient applied subtly to text or button. Animated counters for stats.
components.cards: White background, subtle `shadow-sm`, 1px border (`border-slate-100`). Include padding `p-8`. Icon in top left with subtle Rose Pink or Indigo background.

buttons.primary: Solid Royal Blue background, white text, rounded-full. Hover: lifts up, shadow-lg.
buttons.secondary: Outline button with Royal Blue border and text, rounded-full. Hover: bg-blue-50.
buttons.gradient_accent: Use the primary_gradient for special 'Apply Now' or highlight buttons. Text white.

components.floating_actions: Fixed bottom-right column of circular buttons: WhatsApp, Call, Instagram. Use subtle drop shadows and hover scale.

sections: Hero: 3D interactive bg, bold value proposition, 'Admissions Open' badge, CTA
Stats: Animated counters (Students, Years, Ranks) overlapping the hero/next section
About Teaser: Mission statement, link to full About
Courses Grid: 4 categories (School, Commerce, Professional, Medical) in bento-style cards
Why Choose Us: Animated staggered feature cards
Testimonials: Slider/Carousel of student success stories
CTA Section: Dark background section (#0F172A) with the primary gradient used as an accent border or text clip. Admission enquiry trigger.
Hero: Deep blue background with large typography and Founder's quote
Founder Message: Two-column layout (Text left, Founder Image right with subtle parallax)
Campus Gallery: Masonry grid with Lightbox capability using the provided campus photos
Social Proof: Instagram/YouTube feeds or links
Tabs/Filter: Filter by School, Commerce, Professional, Medical
Course Cards: Detailed cards with syllabus highlights, eligibility, and 'Apply Now' button
Content Split: Left - Contact details (Address, Phone, Email, Social links) + Google Maps embed. Right - Admission Enquiry Form (Shadcn customized)

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use pure valid React code with Tailwind classes. Implement the routing for Home, About, Courses, Contact.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main App wrapper.
Use Framer Motion for text reveals (stagger children) and card entrances when scrolling into view.
Implement an interactive background in the Hero section. You can use 'react-tsparticles' or a custom Three.js canvas if possible. Keep it subtle, professional, with slow moving nodes or waves.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Use Fraunces for headings and Outfit for body. Load them via Google Fonts in index.css.
Use Royal Blue (#1D4ED8) as the primary solid color for buttons and highlights. Use the primary_gradient sparingly (e.g., text-transparent bg-clip-text for a special keyword, or border gradients).
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="nav-home-link"`, `data-testid="apply-button"`).
Never use placeholder image URLs. Rely exclusively on the provided `media_urls`.
Apply generous padding (p-12, p-24) to sections to maintain the premium, high-end feel.
The Admission form should use Shadcn form components, customized with rounded-xl inputs and subtle borders.
For the campus gallery, implement a CSS columns masonry layout.
